# Editorial Review

Apply human editorial corrections and feedback to a newsletter draft.

## Quick Start

1. Receive correction set (human feedback)
2. Read current newsletter from `output/YYYY-MM_month_newsletter.md`
3. Apply corrections
4. Re-validate
5. Write updated newsletter

## Correction Types

- **Content corrections**: Fix inaccurate claims, wrong dates, incorrect statuses
- **Tone adjustments**: Make more/less technical, adjust formality
- **Section reordering**: Move items between sections
- **Additions**: Add items the pipeline missed
- **Removals**: Remove items that don't fit audience

## Done When

- [ ] All corrections applied
- [ ] Validation still passes
- [ ] Newsletter ready for distribution
